creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 169872
shar patch for new port biology/py-biom-format

portlint: OK

NOTE:  All poudriere testport runs were done after applying the fix for math/openblas in bug 209190.

testport: fails due to problem with science/hdf5; see bug 189453 (poudriere: 9.3-RELEASE-p39, i386)
testport: OK (poudriere: 9.3-RELEASE-p39, amd64)
testport: OK (poudriere: 10.3-RELEASE,    i386)
testport: OK (poudriere: 10.3-RELEASE,    amd64)
